name: Pressure Washing
title: AI Tools for Pressure Washing Companies | Turnkey AI
meta_description: Custom AI tools for pressure washing — quote from photos, book fast, and follow up on every estimate. Built in two weeks, starting at $1,500.
hero_lede: Customers want a price for the driveway, the siding, the deck — and they want it fast. We build the tools that quote, book, and follow up so the warm-season rush turns into booked work.
drains: Quote requests needing a fast price before the customer moves on
Estimating surfaces from vague phone descriptions
Estimates that go quiet with no follow-up
A short busy season with no time to chase leads manually

tools.title: Photo-quote assistant
tools.body: Customers send photos of the driveway or siding; the assistant estimates the surface, gives a price from your pricing, and books the job — a quote and a slot in one conversation.

tools.title: Estimate follow-up assistant
tools.body: Every open estimate gets a well-timed nudge if the customer goes quiet — so larger house-wash and commercial jobs don't slip away.

tools.title: Seasonal re-book assistant
tools.body: It reaches back out to past customers when their surfaces are due again, turning one-time jobs into a yearly recurring base.

tools.title: Morning job brief
tools.body: One text each morning: today's jobs in route order, equipment and supplies to load, and yesterday's revenue.

cases.context: A pressure washing company in a short, intense busy season.
cases.before: Quotes were slow during the rush; customers booked whoever answered first.
cases.after: Photo quotes answered in minutes with a price and a booked slot.
cases.impact: Representative result: more of the season's leads converted before competitors replied.

cases.context: A company with no system to win repeat work.
cases.before: One-time jobs stayed one-time; no one reached back out.
cases.after: Past customers re-contacted automatically when surfaces are due again.
cases.impact: Representative result: a growing base of repeat seasonal customers.

faq.q: Can it quote from customer photos?
faq.a: Yes. Customers send photos; the tool estimates the surface area and gives a price from your pricing. Unusual jobs get flagged for you to confirm.

faq.q: How does it create repeat business?
faq.a: It tracks when past customers' surfaces are due for another wash and reaches out at the right time, turning one-off jobs into a yearly recurring base.

faq.q: Will it work during my short busy season?
faq.a: That's exactly when it earns its keep. It handles the rush of quotes and bookings so you can stay in the field instead of on the phone.
